name: broker-contradicts-doc-directly
rationale: At intake (not post-intake correction), broker email asserts loan_amount $325k while attached loan_application doc shows $185k — direct contradiction in single message. F1.LA canonical-map captures both with broker_initial_intent vs docs source tiers; F2.DH discrepancyHold should activate at intake (no broker_correction tier involved). Distinct from A08 (broker_correction discrepancy) — here broker contradicts within single intake message.
notes: Single-event sequence. BW=CT (contradict, not CR correct) is the distinguishing axis from A08.
